ambiguities.description: What entities, relationships, and boundaries define this system?
How do users and processes interact with the system over time?
What rules, constraints, and compliance requirements apply?
What external systems, integrations, and deployment constraints exist?
What defines MVP, done, and out-of-scope for this construction?
Build from scratch vs configure existing ERP vs integration layer
Which modules are required (finance, HR, inventory, manufacturing, CRM)?
Accounting standards, tax rules, and audit compliance
Data migration scope from existing systems
MVP module boundary and rollout sequence

questions.question: What does success look like for this system?
Who are the primary users and what is the organization size?
What is the timeline and what constraints (budget, compliance, team) apply?
Is this a greenfield build, replacement, or integration layer?
What existing systems must be migrated or integrated?
What accounting standards and compliance requirements apply?
Who will host and operate the system?

assumptions.assumption: Web-based UI is sufficient for MVP

suggested_closures.decision: ERP construction will follow a defined module boundary with explicit phased rollout.
suggested_closures.rationale: ERP is too large to build all at once; phased rollout reduces risk.

seed_tasks.title: Define system scope and success criteria
seed_tasks.transformation: Document what the system must do, for whom, and what success looks like.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: A written scope document exists and has been reviewed.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A third party can understand the scope without asking clarifying questions.

seed_tasks.title: Identify constraints and non-goals
seed_tasks.transformation: Explicitly list budget, timeline, compliance, and out-of-scope items.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: No hidden constraints remain that would invalidate the construction plan.

seed_tasks.title: Decide build vs configure vs integrate strategy
seed_tasks.transformation: Choose whether to build custom ERP, configure existing ERP, or build an integration layer.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Decision is documented with rationale and alternatives rejected.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Decision accounts for total cost of ownership and timeline.

seed_tasks.title: Inventory existing systems and data migration requirements
seed_tasks.transformation: List all systems that interact with ERP data and define migration scope.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: System inventory and data map exist.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: No critical data source or integration is missing from the inventory.

seed_tasks.title: Define MVP module boundary
seed_tasks.transformation: Select which ERP modules are in MVP and which are deferred.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Module boundary is documented with rollout sequence.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: MVP is achievable with available resources and timeline.

residuals.description: System scope and success criteria are not yet defined by the principal.
Constraints, compliance requirements, and non-goals have not been documented.
Build vs configure vs integrate strategy is unresolved.
Required ERP modules and MVP boundary are undefined.
Data migration approach depends on existing system inventory which is incomplete.
